summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Afroboost certification system - payment configuration, level display, and PDF generation features. Fixed 2 backend bugs (route ordering and MongoDB _id serialization). All 16 backend tests pass, frontend displays correctly.

minor.issue: Checkbox state for payment methods not persisting correctly when saving - enabled_payment_methods array is empty even when checkbox is checked. Payment instructions are saved but not the method list.

action_items: MINOR: Fix AdminPaymentConfig.js to properly save enabled_payment_methods array when checkbox is toggled
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Route ordering issue in server.py - /level-progress/admin/all was being matched by /{user_id}/{level_id} pattern. Moved specific routes before parameterized routes.
Fixed: MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue in POST /level-payment-config and POST /level-access/request - now fetching clean result without _id after insert/update.
seed_data_creation: Configured Level 1 (money: 150 CHF, twint), Level 2 (volunteer: Mission de 10h), Level 3 (both: 200 CHF + Aide événementielle)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment configurations are stored in level_payment_config collection. The LevelsPage.js dynamically shows payment/volunteer buttons based on admin config. Unconfigured levels show 'Niveau non disponible actuellement'. PDF generation uses DejaVuSans fonts for UTF-8 French accent support.
